final:
module logic_spec (
    input x, 
    input y, 
    input z, 
    input w,
    output reg result);assign result = (~x & y & ~z & w) | (~x & ~y & z & w) | (x & y & z & w) | (x & y & ~z & w);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result <= ~x & y & ~z & w; result <= ~x & ~y & z & w; result <= x & y & z & w; result <= x & y & ~z & w;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: result <= ~x & y & ~z & w; result <= ~x & ~y & z & w; result <= x & y & z & w; result <= x & y & ~z & w;
